allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: M3-002 is pushed. This scope implements M3-003 MLX worker wrapper around mlx-lm config/dataset conversion, runner protocol, sanitized job events, and ModelRun terminal artifact updates. It also allows a behavior-preserving dataset service extraction because the required m1-smoke bootstrap currently fails the file-size hard limit on that existing service.

phase_notes.plan: Implement M3-003: MLX train handler, mlx-lm JSON/dataset conversion, runner protocol, log/metric JobEvents, adapter manifest/hash terminal updates. Also clear the required m1-smoke hard file-size blocker with a behavior-preserving dataset service extraction. Keep CUDA, checkpoint/resume, API routes/schemas, and DB schema out of scope.
